steps.name: Profile schema template, port, and JSON file adapter
steps.description: JSON Schema template for company profile validation. Profile port (abstract interface for read/write/exists/metadata). JSON file adapter implementing atomic writes (tmp -> bak -> rename), directory creation, file existence detection, and metadata reading.
criteria: JSON Schema template at templates/company-profile-schema.json validates known-good profiles (all required fields, correct types)
JSON Schema template rejects known-bad profiles (missing required fields, wrong types, invalid nesting)
Profile port defines abstract methods: read, write, exists, metadata
JSON file adapter writes atomically: writes to .tmp, backs up existing to .bak, renames .tmp to target
Adapter creates ~/.sbir/ directory if absent
Adapter detects existing profile and returns metadata (company_name, last_modified)
Adapter returns None/empty when no profile exists

steps.name: Profile validation service
steps.description: Pure domain service that validates a profile dict against the JSON Schema template plus custom business rules. Returns field-level errors with expected formats. Covers CAGE format (5 alphanumeric), clearance enum, employee count > 0, required fields, socioeconomic valid values, conditional requirements (CAGE/UEI required when SAM active).
criteria: Valid complete profile passes validation with no errors
Invalid CAGE code (wrong length or non-alphanumeric) returns specific field error with expected format
Invalid security_clearance enum value returns allowed values list
Missing required top-level fields listed individually in errors
Employee count <= 0 rejected with specific error
Invalid socioeconomic values rejected with allowed values
CAGE code and UEI required when sam_gov.active is true; not required when false
Validation result includes valid boolean and list of ProfileFieldError objects

steps.name: Profile builder agent with interview flow and overwrite protection
steps.description: sbir-profile-builder markdown agent. Mode selection (documents/interview/both). Guided interview asking section-by-section with fit scoring impact explanations. Overwrite protection: detect existing profile, offer backup/update/cancel. Profile domain skill with field explanations and interview question templates.
criteria: Agent file at agents/sbir-profile-builder.md follows plugin convention (YAML frontmatter, 200-400 lines)
Skill file at skills/profile-builder/profile-domain.md provides field-by-field fit scoring explanations
Agent handles mode selection: documents, interview, or both
Agent interviews section-by-section covering all schema fields
Agent explains why each field matters for fit scoring when asking
Agent detects existing profile before setup and offers: start fresh (backup), update existing, or cancel
Cancel at any point writes no file

steps.name: Profile commands with preview and validation gate
steps.description: Setup and update commands dispatching to agent. Preview displays all fields human-readable with validation result. Save blocked until validation passes. Edit-during-preview supported. Atomic write on confirmed save.
criteria: Command at commands/sbir-proposal-profile-setup.md dispatches to @sbir-profile-builder with setup context
Command at commands/sbir-proposal-profile-update.md dispatches to @sbir-profile-builder with update context
Both commands follow plugin convention (YAML frontmatter with description and argument-hint)
Preview shows every profile field in human-readable format (not raw JSON)
Validation failures show field name, current value, and expected format
Save requires explicit user confirmation after validation passes
Save uses atomic write pattern via profile adapter

steps.name: Document extraction integration
steps.description: Agent reads PDFs, text files via Read tool and fetches URLs via Bash curl. Extracts profile fields via LLM interpretation. Reports extracted vs missing. Multiple documents are additive. Unsupported formats produce clear error with alternatives.
criteria: Agent reads PDF and text files and extracts profile-relevant fields
Agent fetches URL content via curl and extracts SAM.gov entity data
Extracted fields displayed with values for user verification before entering draft
Missing fields explicitly listed to drive targeted interview for remaining gaps
Multiple documents merge additively without losing prior extractions
Unsupported file format produces actionable error with alternatives (export to PDF, copy to text, skip to interview)

steps.name: Selective profile section update
steps.description: Update flow: load existing profile, show available sections, user selects one, display current values, accept modifications (append to arrays, replace scalars), validate complete updated profile, save atomically. Error when no profile exists.
criteria: Update command shows available sections for modification
Selected section displays current values before modification
Array fields (capabilities, key_personnel, past_performance) append without removing existing entries
Scalar fields (employee_count, security_clearance) replace the value
Unselected sections remain unchanged in saved file
Complete updated profile passes validation before save
No-profile-exists produces error suggesting /sbir:proposal profile setup
